## Summary

A clear description of the documentation issue or missing content.

## Location

Where is the documentation missing or incorrect? (file, section, function...)

## Proposed changes

What should be added, changed, or removed?

## Acceptance Criteria

How will you know the documentation is complete? What must be true for this to be considered done?

## Additional context

Add any other context here.
